title: Mirror, Mirror
description: Teleport to your friends by gazing through the mirror in a unique and survival friendly way!
body:
Obtain a mirror by venturing into the deep dark and using 4 echo shards with any stone and tinted glass to create a mirror.

![Mirror recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/919ba10f010c2d3043df92b9e76c8a361cffa4c8.png)

Interacting with a mirror will teleport you to another player holding a mirror.
(Holding a mirror also means players can teleport to you)

If there is there is more than one other player holding a mirror, it will randomise who you teleport to.


Using a mirror on a lodestone will bind it to that location allowing you to teleport at will!

Putting a lodestone mirror in a dispenser will teleport any entity directly infront of it.


Mirrors do not work interdimensionally!

Try not to teleport when you cant, breaking a mirror is bad luck!

(There is an extremely large distance limit on mirrors temporarily to prevent issues with Create: Aeronautics but this will be reverted once these issues are fixed)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/IciCnkjFzXA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Thank you for checking out my mod!

-Blouish
